languages.text: Стяги трех величайших династий выглядят здесь заложниками.
The banners of the three great dynasties look like hostages here.
languages.original_text: Стяги трех величайших династий выглядят здесь заложниками.

traits.locale_text: The banners of the three great dynasties look like hostages here.
The banners of the three great dynasties look like hostages here.
The banners of the three great dynasties look like hostages here.

languages.text: 三大王朝的旗帜看起来就像被抵押在了这里。
languages.original_text: The banners of the three great dynasties look like hostages here.

traits.locale_text: 三大王朝的旗帜看起来就像被抵押在了这里。

languages.text: Las banderas de las tres grandes dinastías te recuerdan a unos rehenes.
languages.original_text: The banners of the three great dynasties look like hostages here.

traits.locale_text: Las banderas de las tres grandes dinastías te recuerdan a unos rehenes.

languages.text: Les bannières des trois grandes dynasties, en ces lieux, semblent avoir été prises en otage.
languages.original_text: The banners of the three great dynasties look like hostages here.

traits.locale_text: Les bannières des trois grandes dynasties, en ces lieux, semblent avoir été prises en otage.

languages.text: Üç büyük hanedanlığın sancakları burada rehine gibi görünüyor.
languages.original_text: The banners of the three great dynasties look like hostages here.

traits.locale_text: Üç büyük hanedanlığın sancakları burada rehine gibi görünüyor.

languages.text: Die Banner dreier großer Dynastien wirken hier wie Geiseln.
languages.original_text: The banners of the three great dynasties look like hostages here.

traits.locale_text: Die Banner dreier großer Dynastien wirken hier wie Geiseln.

languages.text: 三つの王朝の大旗が、ここには人質のように見える。
languages.original_text: The banners of the three great dynasties look like hostages here.

traits.locale_text: 三つの王朝の大旗が、ここには人質のように見える。
